description: arXiv:2607.19456v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We derive four memory-optimal inference artifacts for transformer attention using the Mathematics of Arrays (MoA), each following directly from the forward-pass Denotational Normal Form (DNF) of with the query-row index fixed to the current decode step. The artifacts are: (1)~a single-query decode DNF in which the $\psi$-reduction eliminates the...
